content:
https://youtu.be/xMHppvYy57g
I Think I Just Found the Best Developer Portfolio
Most developer portfolios are the same.
A hero section.
A list of skills.
A few project cards.
And a contact button.
Then there’s Shubham Gupta’s portfolio.
It doesn’t feel like a portfolio.
It feels like a playground.
You can drag things around, explore projects, play games, discover hidden interactions, and learn about the developer without endlessly scrolling through boring sections.
The best part?
The portfolio itself is a project.
Instead of saying:
“I know how to build interactive experiences.”
It simply lets you experience one.
That’s what makes it memorable.
Not another resume with better CSS.
A portfolio that actually feels like its developer.
Go explore it: https://shubhamgupta.dev/
